steps.title: Identify the key claim
steps.content: The passage emphasizes that Gidra's influence “cannot be measured by the number of newsletters published monthly alone.” This is the deciding clue: influence extended beyond raw publication figures.

steps.title: Find evidence of extended reach
steps.content: Choice D proves this: copies were shared among readers, so actual influence far exceeded the 4,000 monthly publications. Choices A, B, and C address funding, editorial diversity, and physical location—none of which explain how influence could surpass the circulation numbers. That matches choice D — D is correct.
